description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, three-story stone structure with a steeply pitched gabled roof. The facade is adorned with symmetrically arranged blue-framed windows, each floor having a consistent window pattern. The main entrance is a single arched wooden door, centrally located on the front face, and is flanked by stone columns. The roof is dark gray and appears to be made of slate or similar material, with additional architectural details such as dormer windows and stone trim. The building sits on a black base, with some detached architectural elements and pavement tiles nearby, suggesting modularity or ongoing construction. The overall appearance is reminiscent of traditional European residential architecture, with robust masonry and classic proportions.
description: A three-story stone apartment building with a steep gabled roof, blue-framed windows, and a central arched entrance. The structure is symmetrical and features classic European architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full facade of the building.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, the pitched roof, and additional architectural elements laid out beside the structure.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the roof structure, window alignment, and the building's rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Rear and side view displaying the back facade, roof details, and detached components adjacent to the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each floor, with even spacing and alignment across the facade, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
